text:
## B49 - flagship open-corner pickup (SMF)
Realistic 3D steel building B49: 6-storey perimeter SMF office with a FLAGSHIP OPEN CORNER - the
corner column is OMITTED at stories 1-2 (column-free retail corner) and the corner stack is picked
up at Level 2 by heavy transfer girders (W40-class) on BOTH edge lines. Elements supporting the
discontinued column (the two pickup girders + their supporting columns) are designed for the
OVERSTRENGTH combinations (ASCE 7-22 12.3.3.3); check cantilever/discontinuous-column vertical
seismic Ev (12.4.2.2) and the bearing stiffeners at the pickup point. MODELING RECIPE: present-set
omits the corner at the open stories; skip the column pair across the gap (no phantom multi-story
element); transfer girders are continuous (no releases); corner SMF joints check BIAXIALLY.
4x4 @ 28/28 ft; heights 16 + 5x13 ft; SMF bases fixed, gravity pinned. SDC D, R 8, Cd 5.5, Ie 1.0;
seismic governs. Results: T1 = 1.28 s (Ta = 0.94 s); base shear 371 kip; W = 6559 kip; max
inter-story drift 1.15%. All engineering sanity checks pass. Sections (designed-range): SMF columns
W14X342-W14X193, SMF beams W33X141/W30X116, transfer W40X324. Validated 3D model; units kip-inch;
analyses ['ELF','RS']; SMF system.
